title: Cognizance 2026 - Hackathon
description: The annual technical festival of IIT Roorkee. Join the 36-hour flagship hackathon organized by the Cognizance team in collaboration with top tech giants. Food, goodies, and cash prizes worth 2 Lakh INR!

title: Thomso 2026 - Battle of Bands
description: The annual cultural festival of IIT Roorkee. Experience the largest rock battle in Northern India. Live performances, celebrity nights, and food stalls.

title: Introduction to Web3 and Smart Contracts
description: A workshop organized by the SDSLabs (Software Development Section) at IIT Roorkee. Learn Solidity programming, deploy your first smart contract, and build a local dApp.

title: Shaurya 2026 - Inter-Bhawan Basketball Finals
description: Watch the intense basketball finals between Rajendra Bhawan and Radhakrishnan Bhawan. Show your support and cheer on your hostel teams!
location: LBS Sports Stadium Basketball Court, IITR

title: DSG Placement & Internship Prep Talk
description: Digital Software Group (DSG) alumni sharing their experiences on how to crack software engineering internships at top tech product companies. Q&A session included.
